must_have_quals: Passion for data and a strong desire to learn, Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Analytics, Data Science, or a related field, Intermediate proficiency in Python (experience with NumPy, Pandas, or similar libraries is a plus), Experience with relational databases (e.g., SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL), Strong written and verbal communication skills, Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment
core_responsibilities: Collaborate with analytics teams to develop reliable data solutions that meet business needs, Design and implement scalable ETL/ELT processes, Perform data extraction, transformation, and loading from various database sources, Develop utilities, user-defined functions, and frameworks to support efficient data workflows, Build and maintain automated unit tests; participate in integration testing, Troubleshoot and resolve operational and performance issues, Work with architecture and engineering teams to ensure high-quality solutions and adherence to best practices
job_summary: BeaconFire Inc. is an IT consulting firm offering project-based opportunities where engineers contribute to high-impact assignments across diverse clients. This role provides hands-on experience in various technical environments and industries, making it ideal for candidates eager to grow their data engineering expertise.
